list.name: Changes
list.comment: feat(Docker): Added reverse proxy for API access

project.component: { "keyToString": { "ASKED_MARK_IGNORED_FILES_AS_EXCLUDED": "true", "ASKED_SHARE_PROJECT_CONFIGURATION_FILES": "true", "Docker.Dockerfile.executor": "Run", "Docker.Run (ALL).executor": "Run", "Docker.Run (BACK+DB).executor": "Run", "Docker.Run (DB).executor": "Run", "FastAPI.FastAPI.executor": "Run", "FastAPI.Unnamed.executor": "Run", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "Python.DatabaseHandler.executor": "Run", "RunOnceActivity.MCP Project settings loaded": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "SHELLCHECK.PATH": "C:\\Users\\corto\\AppData\\Roaming\\JetBrains\\PyCharm2025.2\\plugins\\Shell Script\\shellcheck.exe", "Shell Script.Backend.executor": "Run", "ai.playground.ignore.import.keys.banner.in.settings": "true", "com.intellij.ml.llm.matterhorn.ej.ui.settings.DefaultModelSelectionForGA.v1": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "dev", "ignore.virus.scanning.warn.message": "true", "junie.onboarding.icon.badge.shown": "true", "last_opened_file_path": "C:/Users/corto/delivery/PRO/Taskly/backend/resources", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_interpreter_path": "node", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "npm.Dev.executor": "Run", "npm.[FRONT] Dev.executor": "Run", "npm.install.executor": "Run", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "ml.llm.agents.accounts", "to.speed.mode.migration.done": "true", "ts.external.directory.path": "C:\\Users\\corto\\delivery\\PRO\\Taskly\\frontend\\node_modules\\typescript\\lib", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" }, "keyToStringList": { "com.intellij.ide.scratch.ScratchImplUtil$2/New Scratch File": [ "GitIgnore" ] } }

task.summary: Default task
feat(Server): Added FastAPI server & basic routes feat(Server): Added Database connector feat(Deployment): Added docker compose yaml file for easier deployment
fix(Database): Made database & requests PostgreSQL syntax compliant fix(Docker): Fixed connexion failure with postgres
feat(Frontend): Added Nginx docker image for frontend with default page feat(DB): Added full DB scheme fix(DatabaseManager): Removed useless scheme init as its initialized by docker
feat(Frontend): Added cards, lists & boards components feat(Frontend): Board page containing requested board feat(Frontend): Added board cards display on /app
feat(Auth): Added login/register frontend routes feat(Frontend): Added changing title depending on what page the user is on
feat(Auth): Added login/register backend routes feat(API): Added header API secret middleware checker
feat(Auth): Added password hash stored in db
feat(Auth): Added Json Web Token sent to user on login

feat(Frontend+API): Added board fetching logic and improved board-related features
- Implemented board fetching functions (`fetchBoards`, `fetchUserBoards`, `fetchMemberBoards`) in the frontend. - Integrated axios for API requests with API key header support. - Updated board and member board display logic on the frontend. - Enhanced routing and added dynamic board linking. - Adjusted backend to improve board fetch API and middleware logic. - Updated database schema to replace `owner` role with `admin` and added API refinements.

feat(Auth+Frontend): Completed login/register functionality and added UI behavior
- Implemented fully functional login and register forms on the frontend with validation. - Enhanced backend routes for login/register to use separate credentials models. - Integrated user authentication flow via JWT in frontend layout, redirecting unauthorized users. - Added reusable header and footer components to standardize layout across pages. - Refactored page wrapper styles, introduced new authentication UI, and updated global theme variables. - Improved consistency of backend status responses by standardizing `statusOk` model usage. - Added `.dockerignore` files for backend and frontend.

feat(Frontend): Enhanced board display layout and added styling updates
- Added CSS classes (`app-content`, `boards`, `boards-owning`, `boards-member`, `boards-list`, `board-item`) to improve structure and layout. - Updated `page.tsx` to include new class names for better semantic and visual hierarchy. - Enhanced `globals.css` with flexbox-based styling to organize board lists and items.

feat(Testing): Add backend test framework and coverage for core routes
- Introduced `pytest` with necessary fixtures (`conftest.py`) for testing backend routes using a `FakeDatabaseHandler`. - Added comprehensive tests for user, board, and authentication routes covering success and failure cases. - Refactored backend models to separate `UserCreate` and `UserRegisterCredentials` for cleaner validation. - Updated `DatabaseHandler.execute` to use `Union` typing for better compatibility.
feat(CI): Added CI backend test
feat(CI): Added mirror gh action
mirror: added repo
fix(Line Separators): Set Line Separators to LF and not CRLF for project files fix(DB): Fixed synthax issues in db scheme
feat(Board): Added Drag & drop for Cards AND lists

feat(Board): Added board sharing: Users can now create invite links for other users to join the board feat(API): Added basic board retrieve endpoint without details (labels, members, lists, cards, ...) fix(App): Fixed different height between member and owning boards in app page. fix(DB): Fixed bad unique for board invites
feat(App): Added loading icon feat(Board): Added limit to prevent user to create an infinite amount of invites.
feat(Board): Added board settings modal for editing board settings (name, description, manage members, labels, ...)
feat(Board): Added permissions for user actions (create card, modifying board title, ...)
fix(Invite page): Fixed useSearchParams now wrapped in a suspense boundary
fix(Invite page): Fixed useSearchParams now wrapped in a suspense boundary
feat(Docker): Added reverse proxy for API access

MESSAGE.value: feat(Server): Added FastAPI server & basic routes feat(Server): Added Database connector feat(Deployment): Added docker compose yaml file for easier deployment
fix(Database): Made database & requests PostgreSQL syntax compliant fix(Docker): Fixed connexion failure with postgres
feat(Frontend): Added Nginx docker image for frontend with default page feat(DB): Added full DB scheme fix(DatabaseManager): Removed useless scheme init as its initialized by docker
feat(Frontend): Added cards, lists & boards components feat(Frontend): Board page containing requested board feat(Frontend): Added board cards display on /app
feat(Auth): Added login/register frontend routes feat(Frontend): Added changing title depending on what page the user is on
feat(Auth): Added login/register backend routes feat(API): Added header API secret middleware checker
feat(Auth): Added password hash stored in db
feat(Auth): Added Json Web Token sent to user on login

feat(Frontend+API): Added board fetching logic and improved board-related features
- Implemented board fetching functions (`fetchBoards`, `fetchUserBoards`, `fetchMemberBoards`) in the frontend. - Integrated axios for API requests with API key header support. - Updated board and member board display logic on the frontend. - Enhanced routing and added dynamic board linking. - Adjusted backend to improve board fetch API and middleware logic. - Updated database schema to replace `owner` role with `admin` and added API refinements.

feat(Auth+Frontend): Completed login/register functionality and added UI behavior
- Implemented fully functional login and register forms on the frontend with validation. - Enhanced backend routes for login/register to use separate credentials models. - Integrated user authentication flow via JWT in frontend layout, redirecting unauthorized users. - Added reusable header and footer components to standardize layout across pages. - Refactored page wrapper styles, introduced new authentication UI, and updated global theme variables. - Improved consistency of backend status responses by standardizing `statusOk` model usage. - Added `.dockerignore` files for backend and frontend.

feat(Frontend): Enhanced board display layout and added styling updates
- Added CSS classes (`app-content`, `boards`, `boards-owning`, `boards-member`, `boards-list`, `board-item`) to improve structure and layout. - Updated `page.tsx` to include new class names for better semantic and visual hierarchy. - Enhanced `globals.css` with flexbox-based styling to organize board lists and items.
feat(Tests): Added unit test using pytest for API routes

feat(Testing): Add backend test framework and coverage for core routes
- Introduced `pytest` with necessary fixtures (`conftest.py`) for testing backend routes using a `FakeDatabaseHandler`. - Added comprehensive tests for user, board, and authentication routes covering success and failure cases. - Refactored backend models to separate `UserCreate` and `UserRegisterCredentials` for cleaner validation. - Updated `DatabaseHandler.execute` to use `Union` typing for better compatibility.
feat(CI): Added CI backend test
feat(CI): Added mirror gh action
mirror: added repo
fix(Line Separators): Set Line Separators to LF and not CRLF for project files fix(DB): Fixed synthax issues in db scheme
feat(Board): Added Drag & drop for Cards AND lists

feat(Board): Added board sharing: Users can now create invite links for other users to join the board feat(API): Added basic board retrieve endpoint without details (labels, members, lists, cards, ...) fix(App): Fixed different height between member and owning boards in app page. fix(DB): Fixed bad unique for board invites
feat(App): Added loading icon feat(Board): Added limit to prevent user to create an infinite amount of invites.
feat(Board): Added board settings modal for editing board settings (name, description, manage members, labels, ...)
feat(Board): Added permissions for user actions (create card, modifying board title, ...)
fix(Invite page): Fixed useSearchParams now wrapped in a suspense boundary
feat(Docker): Added reverse proxy for API access

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: feat(Docker): Added reverse proxy for API access
